title: Can I change an item into a subitem?
excerpt:
I’ve got a board with a bunch of items on it and would like to move some of those items to become subitems of a different item. Ha… that’s a lot of “item” talk! 
For instance, easily changing this list: 
item 1 
item 2 
…

posts.author: cdann (Carol Dann)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve got a board with a bunch of items on it and would like to move some of those items to become subitems of a different item. Ha… that’s a lot of “item” talk!
For instance, easily changing this list:
item 1
item 2
item 3
item 4

into this list:
item 1

  • sub item 2
  • sub item 3
  • sub item 4

It could probably be done by adding another “Move to” option in the bottom pop up that appears once you select some items.

2020-09-25_10-21-04738×188 20.6 KB

posts.author: mcallarse (Baika Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: This is on the product roadmap: Subitems Product Plan.

posts.author: cdann (Carol Dann)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
